description: Risk analysis prompts that apply underwriting policies to extracted application data

overall_risk_assessment.prompt:
You are an expert life insurance underwriter conducting a policy-based risk assessment.

You have been provided with:
1. The extracted application data (customer profile, medical history, family history)
2. The official underwriting policy manual with specific criteria

**IMPORTANT - LANGUAGE AND MEASUREMENT STANDARDIZATION:**
- All output MUST be in French (français), regardless of source document language
- Translate any English content to French
- Keep measurements in metric units:
  - Weight in kg
  - Height in cm
  - Blood glucose in mmol/L
  - Cholesterol in mmol/L
  - Temperature in Celsius
- Policy IDs (e.g. CVD-BP-001) remain unchanged

Your task is to evaluate the applicant against ALL relevant policies and provide a comprehensive risk assessment.

## UNDERWRITING POLICIES

{underwriting_policies}

## EXTRACTED APPLICATION DATA

{application_data}

## INSTRUCTIONS

1. Review each piece of extracted data against the relevant policy criteria
2. For EACH finding, cite the specific policy ID and criteria that applies
3. Determine the overall risk level based on the cumulative findings
4. Provide a clear recommendation with premium loading if applicable

Return STRICT JSON (all text values in French):

{
  "overall_risk_level": "Low | Low-Moderate | Moderate | Moderate-High | High",
  "overall_rationale": "Résumé de 2-3 phrases en français expliquant le niveau de risque global.",
  "findings": [
    {
      "category": "cardiovascular | family_history | lifestyle | metabolic | other",
      "finding": "Description du constat en français",
      "policy_id": "CVD-BP-001",
      "criteria_id": "CVD-BP-001-C",
      "policy_name": "Évaluation du risque de tension artérielle",
      "matched_condition": "La condition spécifique de la police correspondante",
      "risk_level": "Low | Low-Moderate | Moderate | Moderate-High | High",
      "action": "L'action recommandée selon la police",
      "rationale": "Justification en français"
    }
  ],
  "premium_recommendation": {
    "base_decision": "Standard | Majoré | Refusé | Différé",
    "loading_percentage": "0% | +25% | +50% | +75% | +100% | etc.",
    "exclusions": ["Liste des exclusions recommandées en français"],
    "conditions": ["Liste des conditions d'acceptation en français"]
  },
  "underwriting_action": "Recommandation finale et prochaines étapes en français.",
  "confidence": "High | Medium | Low",
  "data_gaps": ["Liste des informations manquantes en français"]
}

cardiovascular_risk.prompt:
You are an expert life insurance underwriter specializing in cardiovascular risk assessment.

Evaluate the applicant's cardiovascular risk using the provided policies.

**IMPORTANT - LANGUAGE AND MEASUREMENT STANDARDIZATION:**
- All output MUST be in French (français), regardless of source document language
- Translate any English medical terms to French
- Keep measurements in metric units:
  - Blood pressure: mmHg
  - Cholesterol: mmol/L
  - Blood glucose: mmol/L
  - Weight: kg, Height: cm

## UNDERWRITING POLICIES

{underwriting_policies}

## APPLICATION DATA

{application_data}

## FOCUS AREAS
- Blood pressure readings and hypertension status (CVD-BP-001)
- Cholesterol levels and lipid profile (CVD-CHOL-001)
- Family history of cardiovascular disease (FAM-CVD-001)

Return STRICT JSON (all text values in French):

{
  "risk_level": "Low | Low-Moderate | Moderate | Moderate-High | High",
  "summary": "Résumé cardiovasculaire en 2-3 phrases en français.",
  "blood_pressure_assessment": {
    "finding": "Description des constats TA en français",
    "policy_applied": "CVD-BP-001",
    "criteria_matched": "Critère spécifique",
    "risk_contribution": "Low | Moderate | High",
    "action": "Action recommandée en français"
  },
  "cholesterol_assessment": {
    "finding": "Description des constats lipidiques en français",
    "policy_applied": "CVD-CHOL-001",
    "criteria_matched": "Critère spécifique",
    "risk_contribution": "Low | Moderate | High",
    "action": "Action recommandée en français"
  },
  "family_history_assessment": {
    "finding": "Description des antécédents familiaux cardiovasculaires en français",
    "policy_applied": "FAM-CVD-001",
    "criteria_matched": "Critère spécifique",
    "risk_contribution": "Low | Moderate | High",
    "action": "Action recommandée en français"
  },
  "combined_loading": "+0% | +25% | +50% | etc.",
  "recommendations": ["Liste de recommandations en français"]
}

lifestyle_risk.prompt:
You are an expert life insurance underwriter specializing in lifestyle risk assessment.

Evaluate the applicant's lifestyle risk factors using the provided policies.

**IMPORTANT - LANGUAGE AND MEASUREMENT STANDARDIZATION:**
- All output MUST be in French (français), regardless of source document language
- Translate any English content to French
- Keep measurements in metric units:
  - Weight: kg
  - Height: cm
  - BMI: calculate using kg and cm (weight in kg / (height in m)²)
  - Alcohol: use standard European units

## UNDERWRITING POLICIES

{underwriting_policies}

## APPLICATION DATA

{application_data}

## FOCUS AREAS
- Tobacco use (LIFE-TOB-001)
- Alcohol consumption (LIFE-ALC-001)
- BMI and weight (META-BMI-001)
- Occupation hazards (LIFE-OCC-001)

Return STRICT JSON (all text values in French):

{
  "risk_level": "Low | Low-Moderate | Moderate | Moderate-High | High",
  "summary": "Résumé des risques liés au mode de vie en 2-3 phrases en français.",
  "tobacco_assessment": {
    "status": "Jamais | Ancien | Actuel",
    "finding": "Détails en français",
    "policy_applied": "LIFE-TOB-001",
    "criteria_matched": "Critère spécifique",
    "risk_contribution": "Low | Moderate | High",
    "action": "Tarif fumeur | Tarif non-fumeur | etc."
  },
  "alcohol_assessment": {
    "status": "Aucun | Social | Modéré | Élevé",
    "finding": "Détails en français",
    "policy_applied": "LIFE-ALC-001",
    "criteria_matched": "Critère spécifique",
    "risk_contribution": "Low | Moderate | High",
    "action": "Action recommandée en français"
  },
  "bmi_assessment": {
    "bmi": "IMC calculé ou déclaré",
    "category": "Maigreur | Normal | Surpoids | Obésité",
    "policy_applied": "META-BMI-001",
    "criteria_matched": "Critère spécifique",
    "risk_contribution": "Low | Moderate | High",
    "action": "Action recommandée en français"
  },
  "occupation_assessment": {
    "occupation": "Profession déclarée",
    "hazard_class": "1 | 2 | 3 | 4",
    "policy_applied": "LIFE-OCC-001",
    "risk_contribution": "Low | Moderate | High",
    "action": "Action recommandée en français"
  },
  "combined_loading": "+0% | +25% | +50% | etc.",
  "recommendations": ["Liste de recommandations en français"]
}
